future reimbursement expected
D - Automobile insurance and no fault
E - Workers' compensation
F - Public health service (PHS) or other federal agency (other than Dept. of Veterans Affairs)
G - Working disabled
H - Black lung
I - Dept. of Veterans Affairs
L- Liability insurance
1 - Potential workers' compensation
2 - Potential black lung
3 - Potential Dept. of Veterans Affairs
Null/Missing - No other primary payer besides Medicare
E_BUYIN_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part A and/or B Entitlement
